title: GAIA Agent Hub Catalog Index
description: Lightweight catalog served at GET /index.json. One entry per agent, summarising the latest published version. Field names mirror gaia-agent.yaml (see docs/spec/agent-hub-restructure.mdx). This is the contract the website Hub pages build from (website/src/data/catalog.ts).

schema_version.description: Index schema version; bumped on breaking shape changes.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last index rebuild.

id.description: Agent slug used in hub URLs (/agents/<id>).

latest_version.description: Highest published SemVer for this agent.

download_size_bytes.description: Size of the latest version's artifact in bytes.

tools_count.description: Number of tools the agent registers; 0 when the manifest omits it.

min_gaia_version.description: Minimum GAIA version (SemVer); empty string when the manifest omits it.

permissions.description: Declared permission strings; empty array when the manifest omits them.

deprecation_message.description: Only present when the latest version's manifest declares one.

npu.description: "required" when the manifest sets requirements.npu: true, else "optional".

readme.description: README.md markdown of the latest version; empty string if none was published.

changelog.description: CHANGELOG.md markdown of the latest version; empty string if none was published.

spec.description: SPEC.md (technical reference) markdown of the latest version; empty string if none was published.

skill.description: SKILL.md (AI-integration playbook) markdown of the latest version; empty string if none was published.

evaluation.description: EVALUATION.md (evaluation guide) markdown of the latest version; empty string if none was published.

scorecard.description: Eval-scorecard markdown (SCORECARD.md body, YAML front matter stripped) of the latest version, rendered as its own doc tab; empty string if none was published.

eval_scorecard_url.description: Public URL of the eval scorecard markdown for the latest version; absent when none was published.

eval_score.description: Aggregate eval score (0-100) parsed from the latest version's scorecard front matter; absent when none was published or parseable.

npm_package.description: npm package name when the agent is distributed via npm (e.g. "@amd-gaia/agent-email"); absent otherwise.

playground_url.description: Localhost playground URL served by the agent's sidecar; absent otherwise.

package.description: Whole-package download (all platform binaries + client + docs) as a single zip plus its file listing. Present only when a package_files manifest was published for the latest version.

filename.description: Zip artifact filename under the version dir, e.g. "agent-email-0.2.1.zip".
